privileged_info_summary: Task specifies creation of a LibreOffice Writer template (.ott format verified as OpenDocument Text Template standard) for fictional company 'Apex Innovations'. All metadata specifications are correct: font options (Liberation Sans/Arial for title, Liberation Serif/Times New Roman for body) are standard available fonts; color hex values (#00008B for Dark Blue, #000000 for Black) are verified correct; margin specifications (2.0 inch top, 1.0 inch other sides) and font sizes (18pt title, 11pt body) are task requirements. Missing implementation files: setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py do not exist in the task directory.
